MemoryTicket.title: MemoryTicket
MemoryTicket.description: A customized aesthetic digital memory ticket stub.

id.description: Unique identifier of the ticket stub.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

title.description: The title or main event of the memory.

location.description: The geocode or text description of the location.

date.description: Date associated with the memory in YYYY.MM.DD format.

quote.description: Personal quote, lyric, or custom note written on the ticket stub.

imageUri.description: Optimized base64 image or storage URL for the snapshot.

themeColor.description: Accent branding theme highlight (e.g., violet, sky, emerald, amber).

backgroundColor.description: The background color of the card/receipt itself (e.g., white, cream, dark, rose).

isFavorite.description: Whether this ticket is flagged as a favorite.

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp in ISO format or ServerTimestamp.

updatedAt.description: Update timestamp in ISO format or ServerTimestamp.

/tickets/{ticketId}.description: Individual memory stubs owned and created by a verified user.
